name: Idefics2 8B
archDisplay: SigLIP-SO400M vision encoder + Mistral-7B-v0.1 decoder, connected via learned Perceiver resampler + MLP modality projection
note: Compact Apache-2.0 VLM roughly 10x smaller than IDEFICS-80B, with strong OCR/document QA via SigLIP + Mistral-7B.
tpsNote: llama.cpp only converts the Mistral-7B LLM portion (mmproj vision tower unsupported), so no verified end-to-end Q4 4090 throughput exists.
